error.title: Call Error
error.message: An unexpected error occurred during the call.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting:
troubleshooting.permissions: Make sure you granted camera and microphone permissions
troubleshooting.browser: Check that your browser supports video calls (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
troubleshooting.https: Ensure you are using HTTPS connection

permissions.title: Camera & Microphone Access
permissions.description: To join this video call, we need access to your camera and microphone.
permissions.grantedDescription: You can now join the video call.
permissions.browserPrompt: Please allow access in your browser settings.

errors.notAllowed: Camera and microphone access denied. Please check your browser settings and allow access.
errors.notFound: No camera or microphone found. Please connect a device and try again.
errors.notReadable: Camera or microphone is already in use by another application.
errors.generic: Unable to access camera and microphone. Please try again.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

browserInstructions.title: How to enable permissions:
browserInstructions.chrome: Click the camera icon in the address bar
browserInstructions.firefox: Click the camera icon in the address bar
browserInstructions.safari: Go to Safari Settings Privacy Camera/Microphone
